name: Job Sequencing Problem
description: Given a set of n jobs where each job i has a deadline and a profit. Every job takes 1 unit of time to complete and only one job can be scheduled at a time. Each job earns profit only if it is completed by its deadline. Find the maximum number of jobs that can be done and the maximum profit. Greedy: sort by profit descending, assign each job to the latest available slot before its deadline.
python_template:
